sessions.intent: Review the pre-parsed-variables proposal, merge latest runtime2, and capture the design direction it surfaced.

before.assumptions: Proposal framed pre-parsed %var% spans in the .pr as a perf + clarity refactor, claiming the builder already parses variable names.
before.risk: Premise unverified; a span block in the .pr risks a second parser and a dual source of truth.

actions.context: Verified the proposal's premise. Runtime resolution (AsT_Impl, Variables.Resolve, TryFullVarMatch) is the only %var% parser; the builder does no variable parsing. Premise false -> perf/span direction is a no-go.

Merged origin/runtime2 into the branch (clean, pushed as e6221c5f9). Re-checked: confidence/build-event pipeline and %x!cost% property-suffix grammar landed, but still zero build-time %var% parsing. Verdict held.

Found MapVariables (orphan, unwired) sketching variable->pipeline. Navigation already executes chained method calls. This is the mechanism the real idea rides on: builder feeds type surface to the LLM, transform lives in the parameter value as a navigation expression.

Captured the reframed direction (build-time value transforms via type-surface-fed navigation), the deciding principle (store in .pr only what re-deriving needs the LLM), the two-paths rules, open decisions, and an example ladder with real .pr snippets. Added a redirect banner to the original proposal.

after.status: Design direction captured; nothing built. Open decisions deferred by Ingi (navigable surface, routing tie-break, collection-query frontier, purity boundary).
after.notes: Branch carries the runtime2 merge plus architect docs. Orphan MapVariables files left in place pending Ingi's call on deletion.
